title: CIFR Stock Earnings: Cipher Mining Beats EPS, Misses Revenue for Q2 2024
text: Cipher Mining (NASDAQ: CIFR) released its second quarter 2024 financial results with mixed performance relative to analyst expectations. The company reported earnings per share of -1 cent compared to analyst estimates of -3 cents, exceeding expectations by 2 cents. Cipher Mining generated $36.81 million in revenue, falling short of the projected $37.96 million by approximately 3%. The company also reported a GAAP net loss of $15 million for Q2 2024. The results fell short of analyst estimates, which had projected a quarterly earnings per share (EPS) of -$0.04 and revenue of $38.06 million. Despite financial challenges, the company reported a current hashrate of approximately 8.7 EH/s, with targets to reach 13.5 EH/s by the end of 2024 and 35.0 EH/s by the end of 2025. This automated earnings coverage was generated using TradeSmith data, designed to quickly disseminate quarterly financial metrics and analyst comparisons without editorial intervention.
